title: Commercial Appraiser
description: We're hiring a Commercial Appraiser at UPS. This is an exciting opportunity to join our operational, reliable, efficiency-driven team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 3-5 years years of experience and are passionate about Logistics, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Conduct real estate valuations using market and income approaches
Research comparable properties and economic indicators
Prepare detailed appraisal reports meeting APPRAISAL standards
Interview property managers and owners regarding operating metrics
Analyze real estate market trends and economic factors
Provide expert opinions on property value for lending and investment decisions

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Real Estate, Finance, or related field
